entries.title: AI State March 2026 — Real benchmarks and capabilities
entries.summary: GPT-5 at 94.6% AIME. Claude Opus 4.5 at 80.9% SWE-bench. Karpathy: coding agents basically didnt work before December 2025 and basically work since. Altman: We are now confident we know how to build AGI. The inflection point happened Q4 2025.

entries.title: AI + Web3 intersection — what actually works
entries.summary: Only 12% of Web3 projects meaningfully use AI (Messari). Real: Bittensor (decentralized ML), Virtuals Protocol (AI agents with on-chain identity), ElizaOS (autonomous agent framework). Solana agentic economy: 479M USDC, 1.78M jobs completed. GOAT token: first AI-driven capital coordination.

entries.title: AI Adoption Curve — where we are in history
entries.summary: US AI adoption 54.6% in 3 years vs PC (19.7%) and internet (30.1%) at same mark. We are at the 1997-1999 internet moment. Barriers are not technical — trust gaps, literacy deficits, infrastructure divides. South Korea playbook shows viral adoption is possible. Next wave: agentic AI doing real work.

entries.title: NORMIES as AI-native NFT — the real positioning
entries.summary: NORMIES is the first programmable on-chain object class designed for an agentic economy. Not NFT with AI features — built for what AI makes possible. 10-contract architecture, fully on-chain pixel art, burn mechanics that evolve tokens. serc1n: civilizational infrastructure between AI and humans. 646 ETH volume in 21 days, 1425 burns (14.2% supply). The Canvas is a prototype for cultural objects in an age where participants are not all human.

entries.title: What the smartest AI minds are saying (2026)
entries.summary: Karpathy: software is eating the world, AI agents are eating software. Altman: rate of change is anxiety-inducing even for him. LeCun: LLMs path to superintelligence is wrong, but AMI Labs bets on alternative. Hassabis: new golden era of discovery, AlphaFold changed biology forever. Amodei: country of geniuses in a data center — I dont write any code anymore.

entries.title: AI hype vs reality — what Agent #306 must never confuse
entries.summary: Overhyped: AGI timelines, enterprise AI ROI claims, most agent demos. Real: biology revolution via AlphaFold, reasoning models (o3/o4), cost collapse (GPT-4 class at 99% cheaper than 2023), coding agents (Cursor, Devin), multimodal understanding. The difference: demos vs deployed at scale.
